summary: Detect and surface when all providers fail in ModelDiscovery.pollOnce() instead of silently returning stale cache
notes: Added successCount/errorCount tracking in pollOnce() provider loop. When all providers fail (errorCount === totalProviders), logs console.error with cache age info and returns { allProvidersFailed: true, staleCache: true }. Normal success path returns allProvidersFailed: false. Purely additive — no existing logic changed. All 7 critical-fixes tests pass.
